case_title: RENT A CAR VS RIVERA ADELIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY RENT A CAR AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA ADELIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
